# Elite Digital Solutions — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Elite Digital Solutions is a cutting-edge digital agency led by CEO Konstantinos Kechagias, specializing in low-code/no-code applications, AI automation, and frictionless lead generation systems that deliver extraordinary profit margins of 85–96% with zero hardware risk. The agency operates two flagship platforms: Butler.ai, a multilingual AI concierge that transforms static business information into live conversational experiences across 19+ verticals, and Eventagram, the ultimate event and exhibition engine that converts trade show booths and private celebrations into automated data and lead machines. Their unifying philosophy — 'Frictionless Automation' — is about eliminating chaos from traditional processes and delivering real-time, beautifully formatted live data to clients' dashboards. Their go-to-market approach is bold and data-driven: they mine decision-maker contacts via LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, and Hunter.io, build fully functional custom demos with the prospect's own branding, and launch targeted cold outreach sequences to secure 15-minute appointments.

---

## Pages

### Αρχική
https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app
Ανακαλύψτε την Elite Digital Solutions: εξαλείφουμε το χάος με λύσεις AI αυτοματισμού, εφαρμογές low-code και συστήματα lead generation που αποδίδουν περιθώρια κέρδους έως 96%. Ξεκινήστε τον ψηφιακό μετασχηματισμό σας σήμερα.

### Butler.ai
https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app/butler-ai
Μετατρέψτε στατικές πληροφορίες σε ζωντανές συνομιλίες με τον Butler.ai, τον πολύγλωσσο AI concierge για ξενοδοχεία και 19+ κλάδους. Αυξήστε τις κρατήσεις με έξυπνο αυτοματισμό τώρα.

### Eventagram
https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app/eventagram
Το Eventagram μεταμορφώνει εκθεσιακά περίπτερα και ιδιωτικές εκδηλώσεις σε αυτοματοποιημένες μηχανές δεδομένων και leads. Αποκτήστε πολύτιμες επαφές χωρίς κόπο με την πλατφόρμα μας.

### Αρχιτεκτονική Αυτοματισμού
https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app/automation-architecture
Η φιλοσοφία &#39;Frictionless Automation&#39; στην πράξη: χτίζουμε αρχιτεκτονικές αυτοματισμού που παραδίδουν ζωντανά δεδομένα στο dashboard σας, χωρίς ρίσκο hardware. Δείτε πώς λειτουργεί.

### Επικοινωνία
https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app/contact
Είστε έτοιμοι να εξαλείψετε το χάος; Επικοινωνήστε με τον Κωνσταντίνο Κεχαγιά και λάβετε ένα δωρεάν, επωνυμικό demo των λύσεων AI αυτοματισμού μας. Κλείστε το 15λεπτο ραντεβού σας.

### Contact form
- URL: https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://elite-digital-solutions-31f9ce61.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Elite Digital Solutions
Elite Digital Solutions is a cutting-edge digital agency led by CEO Konstantinos Kechagias, specializing in low-code/no-code applications, AI automation, and frictionless lead generation systems that deliver extraordinary profit margins of 85–96% with zero hardware risk. The agency operates two flagship platforms: Butler.ai, a multilingual AI concierge that transforms static business information into live conversational experiences across 19+ verticals, and Eventagram, the ultimate event and exhibition engine that converts trade show booths and private celebrations into automated data and lead machines. Their unifying philosophy — 'Frictionless Automation' — is about eliminating chaos from traditional processes and delivering real-time, beautifully formatted live data to clients' dashboards. Their go-to-market approach is bold and data-driven: they mine decision-maker contacts via LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, and Hunter.io, build fully functional custom demos with the prospect's own branding, and launch targeted cold outreach sequences to secure 15-minute appointments.

## Services/Products
- Butler.ai — AI-powered multilingual (50+ languages) Digital Concierge & B2B/B2C Lead Generation for hospitality, real estate, restaurants, yachting, clinics, and 19+ verticals
- Eventagram — Low-code Event & Exhibition Engine for B2B trade shows (lead capture, QR code system, live Google Sheets dashboard) and B2C private events (RSVPs, seating, photo sharing, digital guestbook)
- Low-code/No-code Application Development
- AI Automation Systems
- Cold Outreach Strategy with custom branded demos

## Target Audience
- B2B Decision Makers across 19 vertical markets including Hotels, Airbnb hosts, Real Estate, Beach Bars, Restaurants, Medical Tourism, Yachting, Showrooms, Clinics, Event Organizers, and Exhibition participants (e.g., ΔΕΘ)
- Enterprise Tech Decision Makers
- Hospitality Automation Seekers
- Real Estate Innovators
- Event Technology Adopters

## Industry
Digital Agency / Technology / AI Automation
